---
title: "Optimising R code for BlueBEAR"
description: |
  James Carpenter from the BEAR Apps team in ARC speaks about how to optimise your R code for
  the heterogeneous BlueBEAR HPC cluster (including use on BEAR Portal). Topics include self-installing R packages and running parallel jobs.
author:
  - name: James Carpenter
    url: https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/research/arc/rsg/staff/james-carpenter
date: 2026-05-19
categories:
  - talks
  - packages
image: "../../images/logo_rug.png"
draft: false
lightbox: true # N.B. need blank line between photos for this to work
---

## Overview

## Event details

**Date:** 2026-05-19

**Time:** 15:00

**Location:** Elm House

**Teams**: [TEAMS LINK](https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_NzIyZDdlNGUtZjI5ZC00Yzk5LWJkMjktYmViZWM1YzNhOTFi%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%22b024cacf-dede-4241-a15c-3c97d553e9f3%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%229255ac55-8191-41dc-94ee-df2e74a27860%22%7d)

## About the speaker

## Resources

- [Slides](2026-05_R_User_Group.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Meeting agenda](https://bham-my.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/personal/a_changenet_bham_ac_uk/_layouts/15/guestaccess.aspx?share=IQAv8cqG4TUxRqRO9anyx0d4ATvgl3dg9U_MCjdrwHWL3QE&isSPOFile=1&ovuser=b024cacf-dede-4241-a15c-3c97d553e9f3%2Cc.c.stawitz%40bham.ac.uk&wdExp=TEAMS-TREATMENT&web=1&CID=09faf711-690d-4c02-9f5a-2cf02ae3939f&clickparams=eyJBcHBOYW1lIjoiVGVhbXMtRGVza3RvcCIsIkFwcFZlcnNpb24iOiI0OS8yNjA0MTYxNzIxNSJ9&linkOpenTime=1779288202840)
- [Meeting recording](https://bham-my.sharepoint.com/personal/c_c_stawitz_bham_ac_uk/Documents/Recordings/R%20user%20group%20meeting%20placeholder-20260519_150338-Meeting%20Recording.mp4?csf=1&web=1&e=D1C1WC&nav=eyJyZWZlcnJhbEluZm8iOnsicmVmZXJyYWxBcHAiOiJTdHJlYW1XZWJBcHAiLCJyZWZlcnJhbFZpZXciOiJTaGFyZURpYWxvZy1MaW5rIiwicmVmZXJyYWxBcHBQbGF0Zm9ybSI6IldlYiIsInJlZmVycmFsTW9kZSI6InZpZXcifX0%3D)

<iframe class="slide-deck ar16x9" src="2026-05_R_User_Group.pdf" title="Slides">
</iframe>

<!-- ## Photos

Add after the event

![](media/IMG1.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/IMG2.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/IMG3.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

-->
